sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27305" key="*dioshmeiako/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Δῐοσημ-ειακός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n27305.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">portent-bearing,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀστέρες</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2580.tlg003:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
